sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kumpi lukhu, kumpi lukhu, Topa Jesuh khusak un!
Kumpi lukhu, kumpi lukhu, Topa Jesuh

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Vantung a misiang khempeuh in, Topa Jesuh min phat hi
Thukhen tokhom tung tusak a, vantung mite

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mi gilote’n ling tawh kigan, lukhu Jesuh khusak hi;

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ama min phatin kiko ni, gal zawh pawikhamna ngai un
Topa Jesuh in man ngah hi, lungdam huai bel
